header: See how Northwind relaunched five brands on Desiderio
quote: We recorded our relaunch retro because nobody believed the timeline: five brand sites in six weeks, each subtree on its own theme preset, all on one TYPO3 install. We bought installation (€890) and a custom brand preset from the creators — both paid for themselves before the second brand launched.

poster_image.title: Desiderio hero page in the Lagoon preset
poster_image.alternative: Desiderio frontend hero page rendered in the Lagoon theme preset.
